name: Spicy Mexican Tortilla Stacks
recipeIngredient: 1 can Pinto Beans (15 oz), drained and rinsed
1 can Black Beans (15 oz), drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Combine beans and corn in a large bowl.
3. Stir in chilies, onion, and green pepper.
4. Lay one tortilla at the bottom of a greased two-quart souffle or casserole dish.
5. Spoon a small amount of bean mixture over the tortilla.
6. Top with equal amounts of Monterey Jack and Cheddar cheese.
7. Continue alternating layers of tortilla, bean mixture, and cheese mixture until you end with a cheese layer.
8. Bake covered at 425°F for 10 minutes.
9. Serve with salsa.
